Returning from their [[Destruction of Sernpidal|Mission to Sernpidal]], [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces followed the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and the other escaping spaceships, resulting in the '''Battle of Dubrillion'''.

[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] was alerted that the Vong forces were coming, and they prepared for battle.

[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], and [[Anakin Solo]] all flew modified [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1s]], but were told to stay near [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion's]] surface, under the shield protection of ''[[Belt-Runner I]]''. Above, [[Kyp Durron]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] battled in the ''Millennium Falcon'', along with the fighters that Calrissian had managed to recruit.

However, ''Belt-Runner I'' was destroyed, taking away the shields of the Solo children. After fighting near the surface for a while, they fought upwards, drawing the Yuuzhan Vong force away from Dubrillion, and towards [[Lando's Folly]]. They wove in and out of the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]], using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to guide them, destroying much of the invasion force. This proved too much for [[Anakin Solo]], who lost his concentration and made a blind [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump. Fortunately for him, his parents arrived at the [[Star system/Legends|system]] in his ship, ''[[Calrissian Runner]]'', came out of hyperspace to bring him back. They returned, but the victory was bittersweet.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:BattleOfDubrillon.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Depicted as TIE/Ins.]]
''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' incorrectly presents the ships that the Solo children piloted in this battle as [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]].<ref name="NJO Sourcebook">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref> In reality, they flew in [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]] starfighters, as depicted in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', where the Battle of Dubrillion first appeared.<ref name="Vector" />
